productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Brown Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers with an edge. Give your formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion. Upper Leather upper for absolute comfort and style Slip-on style for ease of use Concealed elasticated gussets on the midfoot below the tongue to offer a snug, customised Fit Leather inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfort Leather footbed for absolute all-day comfort Outsole Textured TPR outsole with grooves for ease of movement and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
